name: Microwave Two Minute Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Milk or half and half
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except nuts in a bowl; do not mix.
2. Microwave on high for 2 minutes.
3. Beat with an electric mixer until smooth.
4. Add nuts and pour mixture into a buttered 8x8-inch pan.
5. Refrigerate for 15 to 20 minutes.
6. Cut into desired sizes.
